title: Quick Asparagus Bowl
description: A simple and healthy bowl filled with roasted asparagus, crispy tofu, and a drizzle of soy sauce.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Toss the asparagus with olive oil, garlic, and ginger on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until tender.
While the asparagus is roasting, cook the tofu in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Once the tofu is golden brown, remove it from the pan and cut it into small pieces.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and a pinch of salt and pepper.
To assemble the bowls, place a portion of the roasted asparagus on the bottom.
Add the cooked tofu on top of the asparagus.
Drizzle the soy sauce mixture over the tofu.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
